overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit elevated walkway, taking an elevator down to a street level district with Japanese-inspired architecture, red lanterns, and vibrant cherry blossom trees illuminated by pink neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated walkway with purple neon floor lighting

events.description: passing by illuminated vending kiosk with orange neon lighting on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered walkway with glowing purple neon strips embedded in the floor

notable_agents.action: person walking in the opposite direction along the walkway

entered.detail: metal ceiling with exposed industrial beams covering the walkway
glowing purple light strips embedded in the concrete floor
illuminated vending machine with bright orange neon border
glass panels with teal backlighting showing city view beyond

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered elevated walkway illuminated by purple neon floor strips. The path is flanked by a teal-lit glass barrier on the left revealing the city below, and a glowing vending kiosk appears on the right. A lone pedestrian walks in the opposite direction in the distance.

events.description: approaching elevator lobby with view of neon-lit city buildings
elevator metal gate doors opening after pressing call button

agents.ego_description: approaching the elevator control panel, pressing the call button, and entering the elevator cabin

entered.detail: digital touch panel with 'CALL ELEVATOR' text and cyan backlighting
panoramic view of neon-lit skyscrapers and elevated highways through the walkway opening
red-lit elevator cabin with metal accordion gate doors

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the end of the walkway, revealing an open view of the neon-lit cityscape below. The camera approaches an elevator with a glowing cyan call panel. After pressing the button, the metal gate doors open and the character enters the red-lit elevator cabin.

events.description: elevator begins descending from floor 3 to floor 2 as indicated on the control panel
elevator doors opening to reveal the street level district

agents.ego_description: standing inside the elevator as it descends from the upper level to the street level

entered.detail: yellow and black floor indicator panel showing descending floor numbers
metal bench mounted on the back wall of the elevator cabin

segments.scene_description: Inside the red-lit elevator cabin, the character descends from floor 3 to floor 1. The control panel displays the descending floor numbers with yellow arrows. The elevator stops and the metal gate doors open to reveal a gritty street-level plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial district with Japanese architecture and cherry blossoms

events.description: exiting elevator into open street level plaza with red lanterns and food stalls
turning to view the large red NURU sign and surrounding cherry blossom trees
looking upward at towering skyscraper with large illuminated signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit district, observing the Japanese-inspired architecture and looking up at the towering buildings

notable_agents.action: person standing near the railing overlooking the plaza
pedestrian walking across the wet pavement in the plaza

entered.detail: large bright red neon sign with 'NURU' text mounted on building facade
trees with pink illuminated blossoms lining the plaza
traditional red paper lanterns hanging near wooden food stalls
wooden roofed market stall with hanging merchandise
massive skyscraper with large vertical illuminated signage
large digital screen displaying advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: Exiting the elevator, the scene opens into a vibrant street-level district with wet pavement reflecting neon lights. The character walks past food stalls with red paper lanterns and a large red 'NURU' sign. Pink illuminated cherry blossom trees line the path as the camera pans up to reveal a massive skyscraper towering above the plaza, covered in bright digital billboards.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sterile, neon-lit elevated walkway down into a vibrant, gritty street-level district. It begins by moving along a covered path defined by purple floor strips and teal glass barriers, passing a glowing vending kiosk as a lone pedestrian walks in the distance. As the walkway ends to reveal the sprawling cityscape, the camera approaches and enters a red-lit elevator cabin via a cyan call panel. The scene then shifts during a descent from the third to the first floor, with the control panel tracking the movement before the metal gates open to a wet, reflective plaza. Finally, the camera exits into a district filled with red paper lanterns and pink illuminated cherry blossom trees, panning upward from the food stalls to reveal a massive skyscraper draped in digital billboards.
